## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, reporting, and LLM search attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on refining AI content reporting: clean up Airtable, create cohorts, and improve visibility in dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Implement Scrunch (LLM tracking tool) to monitor content performance in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Develop strategy to better attribute leads from LLM searches to specific content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [New collaboration: Eric (Webstacks' digital marketing manager) joining weekly calls](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Reporting Refinement

  - [Need to isolate AI management content in dashboard for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Updates required in Airtable for consistency across chapters and cohorts](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Goal: Create a comprehensive view of AI-related content performance](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Action: Clean up uncategorized content and improve data organization](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

### LLM Search Attribution

  - [Webstacks seeing increased leads from LLM searches (e.g., Perplexity, Gemini, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [Challenge: Difficulty in attributing leads to specific content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Current methods:](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Ask leads how they found Webstacks during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
      - [Track referral traffic to specific blogs](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Monitor direct traffic and branded searches as proxy](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Proposed solution: Implement Scrunch (GrowthX's tool) to track visibility in LLM results](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [Features: Citation frequency, sentiment analysis, competitor tracking, page optimization recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

### Content Strategy for LLM Visibility

  - [Plan to add new AI-focused content (40-50 pages) to Scrunch for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Align organic keyword strategy with LLM prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Future content series will be monitored in Scrunch from launch](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)

### Coffee Chats Content Utilization

  - [GrowthX team creating content from coffee chats](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Eric to incorporate this content into social calendars, emails, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [First iterations to be reviewed by Webstacks team for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up Scrunch and add current keywords/prompts for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Clean up and refine AI content reporting in Airtable and dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Jesse to provide list of LLM-sourced leads and their feedback for prompt creation](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Rachel to send coffee chat content for review (expected Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Implement new content strategy utilizing coffee chat material](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Prepare for next week's discussion on chapter performance and future content direction](https://fathom.video/share/Nc-pKXCL3XwVsdQPJvAXix6qTxgNRWKN?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
